examples: Thoughts appear as kaleidoscopic patterns of light and sound.
Flaming hoops and torches added deep orange flashes to the kaleidoscopic scene.
Their most frequent responses read like a kaleidoscopic view of our best and worst attributes.
But the film ultimately succeeds in shedding kaleidoscopic light on both the man and the music.
Beyonce was introduced by a fan countdown, a kaleidoscopic imagery of Beyonce fans, fireworks and Pepsi product placements.
